title: rhododendron borneense subsp. angustissimum
intro: Rhododendron borneense subsp. angustissimum is a rare, narrow-leaved subspecies of the Bornean rhododendron, native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rhododendron borneense subsp. angustissimum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in traditional medicine, often in the form of extracts or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
